item.title: Roy Hammer Air Assist Treadle
item.description: A calm look at the Roy Hammer air assist treadle, highlighting its versatility and practical shop use in blacksmithing.

media:content.media:title: Roy Hammer Air Assist Treadle
media:content.media:description: A calm look at the Roy Hammer air assist treadle, highlighting its versatility and practical shop use in blacksmithing.

item.title: Need a Tool, Make a Tool.
item.description: A practical blacksmithing mindset: when a tool is needed, make one by hand. A simple, satisfying look at shop-made solutions and craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Need a Tool, Make a Tool.
media:content.media:description: A practical blacksmithing mindset: when a tool is needed, make one by hand. A simple, satisfying look at shop-made solutions and craftsmanship.

item.title: Sharpening Drill Bits with Drill Doctor
item.description: A practical review of sharpening drill bits with the Drill Doctor, focusing on tool maintenance, precision, and workshop efficiency.

media:content.media:title: Sharpening Drill Bits with Drill Doctor
media:content.media:description: A practical review of sharpening drill bits with the Drill Doctor, focusing on tool maintenance, precision, and workshop efficiency.

item.title: Repurposing Old Scrap Iron by Hand
item.description: A calm blacksmithing challenge focused on repurposing old scrap iron with careful heat, shaping, and traditional shop technique.

media:content.media:description: A calm blacksmithing challenge focused on repurposing old scrap iron with careful heat, shaping, and traditional shop technique.

item.title: Reimagining Mastermyr Viking Hinges

item.title: Blacksmith's Twist: Forging a Metal Puzzle
item.description: A blacksmith’s twist shown through careful forging and shaping, turning metal into a satisfying puzzle-inspired form.

item.title: The Old Forge, New Life
item.description: An old forge is brought back into use, highlighting restoration, craftsmanship, and the continued tradition of blacksmithing.

item.description: A new forging project gets underway as raw steel is shaped and prepared using traditional blacksmithing techniques and workshop tools.
